meaning: n.摇摆的人,蠕动的东西,[昆]孑孓
examples: It is shown that a FEL operation is possible in this wiggler by using higher harmonics.
The free electron laser with a linearly polarized wiggler and axial guide field hag been studied.
With the help of MAGIC program, a new coaxial hybrid wiggler FEL amplifier was investigated in this paper.
The wiggler turned a page in the file before him.
